/Library/Developer/CommandLineTools/usr/bin/c++  -arch arm64 -isysroot /Library/Developer/CommandLineTools/SDKs/MacOSX15.2.sdk -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/downloader.dir/src/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/downloader.dir/src/core/Downloader.cpp.o CMakeFiles/downloader.dir/src/core/ThreadPool.cpp.o CMakeFiles/downloader.dir/src/network/HTTPClient.cpp.o CMakeFiles/downloader.dir/src/utils/Logger.cpp.o CMakeFiles/downloader.dir/src/utils/FileManager.cpp.o -o bin/downloader
